rules.scheduling: random 07:00 to 09:00 Europe/Paris, one per weekday
rules.pipeline: serp_brief (Gemini 2.5 Pro grounded) -> Mistral large draft -> Claude Sonnet audit grounding -> Mistral fix
rules.standards: 3500+ words, TL;DR data-speakable, FAQ 5+, Sources 5+, internal links 10+, external authority 5+, zero em-dash

published_manually.author: Thomas Moreau
